title: Senior Network Engineer
description:
Senior Network Engineer

We are seeking and experienced and hands-on Senior Network Engineer to join our team, specializing in network infrastructure and cybersecurity. The ideal candidate will provide expert-level support in network design, configuration, and system integration for mission-critical industrial control systems. This role involves working both in-house and at customer sites to ensure the reliable, secure, and efficient operation of SCADA and IT/OT networks.

You will collaborate closely with customers, contractors, and internal teams to deliver robust network solutions, conduct system hardening and support production operations. This position requires deep technical knowledge in network architecture and system security as well as strong project execution and troubleshooting capabilities.

Responsibilities:

  • Design, implement, and maintain secure network infrastructure for SCADA and industrial automation system
  • Perform system configuration, administration, and maintenance support for servers, firewalls and network devices
  • Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior engineers and project teams
  • Set up and configure switches, routers, and firewalls
  • Support incident response, troubleshooting and root cause analysis for network-related issues
  • Collaborate with customers and system integrators on network architecture design, upgrades, and system integration projects
  • Assist in technical presentations, solution proposals, and product demonstration when required

Requirements:

  • Minimally Bachelor's degree in computer science, information technology, network engineering or cybersecurity operations
  • Strong understanding of networking fundamentals
  • Hands-on experience in Windows/Linus OS administration and hardening as well as MS SQL server hardening
  • Good knowledge of industrial networking is an advantage
  • Familiarity with cybersecurity frameworks, hardening methodologies and network monitoring tools
  • Certifications such as CCNA, Network+, Security+ or equivalent are preferred
  • Demonstrated ability to work independently and lead projects with minimal supervision
  • Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail and communication skills
  • Proactive learner with a passion for emerging network and cybersecurity technologies
  • Team player with good communication skills

postedCompany.description: Willowglen Services Pte Ltd (“WSPL”) was established in Singapore, in the year of 1986 with a paid-out capital SGD $2,000,002. The company was established with the primary purpose to provide SCADA products & integrated SCADA, Security & IT solutions for our local & regional customers. WSPL is a leading SCADA company that has more than 30 years of experience to design, customize, and implement inclusive maintenance, to turnkey integrated SCADA, Security & IT solutions for various industries such as for the water & power utilities sectors, oil/gas production & distribution, building & facilities, security, transport, telecommunication and IT sector. WSPL is a subsidiary of the Willowglen Group of companies and with its corporate headquarter & R&D center - Willowglen MSC Berhad, a public-listed company located in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. With more than 30 years of experience. Willowglen’s capability goes beyond Scada and its related solutions. We are an ISO 9001 and OHSAS 18001:2007 certified company that is continuously evolving and innovating. With the implementation of international standards and quality, Our team recognizes the importance of accommodating rapidly changing business requirements, and also the increased demand in productivity. Willowglen Strength and Services   R&D   Maintenance Support   Engineering   Project Management
